## Crops per plot

```{r}
#| label: crops per plot table

crops_per_plot_df <- create_df_for_table(
  data_path = params$dir_data,
  analysis_df_name = "crops_per_plot_df",
  interview_meta_df = supervisor_interviewer_interview
)

tbls50x30::crops_per_plot(
  crop_df = crops_per_plot_df,
  cases = cases_for_report,
  parcel_id_var = monitor50x30:::extract_id_var_names(params_df$crops_per_plot_parcel_id_var),
  plot_id_var = monitor50x30:::extract_id_var_names(params_df$crops_per_plot_plot_id_var),
  group_var = "supervisor"
)

```
